siteConfig.name: Anil Khanna
siteConfig.title: Senior Full Stack Developer
siteConfig.description: I build things that live in your pocket and on your screen.

whatIDo.label: 02. WHAT I DO
whatIDo.title: What I Bring to the Table

aboutData.heading: About Me
paragraphs: I'm a Senior Full Stack Developer with 14+ years of experience building scalable mobile and web applications. My expertise spans across iOS (Swift, Objective-C), Flutter, React, Next.js, and .NET Core — bridging the gap between elegant front-end experiences and robust back-end systems.

Throughout my career, I've led engineering teams of up to 14 developers, co-founded a startup that scaled to 200k+ users, and delivered enterprise solutions for global brands. I'm passionate about clean code, performance optimization, and mentoring the next generation of developers.

whatIDo.title: MOBILE APPS
whatIDo.description: Native iOS (Swift, Obj-C) and cross-platform Flutter apps shipped to millions of users. From system architecture to App Store optimization — I own the full mobile lifecycle.

whatIDo.title: WEB APPS
whatIDo.description: Modern web applications with React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Server-side rendering, responsive design, and performance tuning for production-grade experiences.

whatIDo.title: BACKEND & APIs
whatIDo.description: Scalable backend systems with .NET Core, Node.js, REST APIs, GraphQL, and cloud infrastructure on AWS. Designed for throughput, reliability, and developer ergonomics.

whatIDo.title: TEAM & DELIVERY
whatIDo.description: Engineering leadership, Agile delivery, CI/CD pipelines, code reviews, and mentoring. Led teams of up to 14 engineers and co-founded a startup scaled to 200k+ users.

careerData.description: Building the DM stock management app end-to-end on Flutter, serving one of Germany's largest retail chains. Optimized API contracts and reduced app launch time by 20%. Mentoring developers and driving technical decisions across the mobile stack.

Led iOS development for MyGate, India's leading gated community platform with 1M+ active users. Owned the full iOS lifecycle — architecture, API contract design, performance profiling, and release management. Architected core security and visitor management modules.

Co-founded a mobile-first startup and scaled it to 200k+ active users. Redesigned the app architecture for high performance and built features that achieved 30% faster time-to-market. Defined product roadmaps alongside co-founders and led the engineering team.

Developed enterprise EH&S (Environmental, Health & Safety) compliance apps for global clients. Built offline-first iOS architecture enabling field workers to operate in low-connectivity environments. Delivered modules for incident reporting, audits, and safety inspections.

Led a team of 14 developers and delivered 10+ iOS projects across e-commerce and fitness verticals with a 95% on-time delivery rate. Established code review practices and modular architecture patterns that became the team's standard.
Translated client concepts into polished iOS applications across multiple domains. Mentored 3 junior developers, managed task allocation, and introduced structured code review workflows to the team.
Built foundational iOS development skills working on production apps from day one. Delivered client-facing projects using Objective-C and UIKit, gaining deep expertise in the Apple ecosystem.

projectsData.title: Ria Money Transfer
projectsData.description: International money transfer app serving millions of users globally with real-time exchange rates. Built secure payment flows and optimized the cross-platform experience on Flutter and iOS.

projectsData.title: RMT Secure Portal
projectsData.description: Secure web portal for Ria Money Transfer enabling international fund transfers with real-time exchange rates and transparent fee calculations. Built the frontend architecture for a seamless, compliant money transfer experience across 165+ countries.

projectsData.title: MyGate
projectsData.description: India's leading gated community management app with 1M+ active users. Architected core security and visitor management modules, streamlined API integrations, and drove performance improvements across the iOS platform.

projectsData.title: EXP Suite
projectsData.description: Enterprise EH&S compliance platform for environmental health and safety reporting. Built offline-first architecture enabling field workers to capture incidents, audits, and inspections without connectivity.

projectsData.title: 1-800-Flowers
projectsData.description: One of America's top gifting e-commerce apps. Developed seamless checkout flows, product browsing with rich media, and push notification campaigns that boosted user engagement.

projectsData.title: Performix
projectsData.description: Fitness app featuring a 6-week guided video workout program. Built video streaming, progress tracking, and workout scheduling with a focus on smooth playback and offline caching.

projectsData.title: CoFetch
projectsData.description: A verified student-only social network using college email authentication. Built real-time messaging, activity matching, and campus-based discovery features from the ground up.

projectsData.title: CES Official App
projectsData.description: The official mobile app for the International Consumer Electronics Show in Las Vegas. Built interactive floor maps, exhibitor search, and personalized session scheduling for 170k+ attendees.

projectsData.title: Eventa
projectsData.description: End-to-end events management platform for organizers and attendees. Built event creation workflows, RSVP management, and real-time attendee coordination features.
